title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past: Turning Point
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Sabo, Dadan, Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #20 as the scene develops across pages 16–21.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sabo, Dadan, Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #18, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: Give him back? Try speaking sense, urchins.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Sabo is my own flesh and blood!!!

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: I'll hear no more from you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: I leave the rest to you, pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Just please... Don't harm Ace and Luffy!!

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sabo, Dadan, Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #18, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: turning point.
